reportTitle: Council Brief v5 — 5 Real Founder Test Report
testMethod: 5 farklı startup fikri, 5 farklı coğrafya/sektör, production API (council-zeta.vercel.app) üzerinden test

testCases.idea: AI-powered personal finance app for Gen Z in Turkey (SMS-based)
testCases.founderProfile: Ex-Getir PM + METU ML Engineer, $50K bootstrapped, 200 beta users
testCases.notes: v4'te test edildi, v5 ile henüz tekrar test edilmedi

testCases.idea: HIPAA compliance automation for small US healthcare clinics using LLMs
testCases.founderProfile: Solo founder, 8yr healthcare IT, $30K savings, no users
testCases.notes: v4'te test edildi, v5 ile henüz tekrar test edilmedi

testCases.idea: Uber for construction workers marketplace in Germany
testCases.founderProfile: 2 ex-McKinsey + construction manager + dev, €200K angel, 30 workers signed up
testCases.notes: v4'te test edildi, v5 ile henüz tekrar test edilmedi

testCases.idea: Premium fresh dog food D2C brand in India, subscription + cold chain delivery
testCases.founderProfile: Ex-Swiggy ops lead + veterinarian, ₹15 lakh (~$18K) savings, no product

whyThisMayFail: Cold chain logistics costs in Indian summer heat (45°C+) make unit economics impossible even at premium pricing
Indian pet owners prove unwilling to pay subscription premiums when cheaper alternatives available at every pet store
₹15L budget burns through in 8-10 months before achieving sustainable unit economics and repeat customers
FSSAI regulatory approval takes 12+ months, competitors launch similar products first
Manufacturing quality control fails in Indian supply chain, leading to pet health issues and brand damage
Veterinary community doesn't endorse fresh food over established brands, limiting credibility-driven sales

strengths: Ex-Swiggy ops experience directly relevant for food delivery logistics and supply chain
Veterinarian co-founder provides medical credibility and product formulation expertise
Combined background covers both operational execution and domain expertise
gaps: No direct experience with cold chain logistics for perishable goods
Limited knowledge of FSSAI regulations and pet food manufacturing compliance
No marketing/brand building experience in premium consumer goods
founderFit.recommendation: Hire freelance marketing specialist with premium D2C experience (₹50K/month) and consult with pet food regulatory expert (₹2L one-time) before launch

assumptionLedger.assumption: Urban Indian pet owners will pay 3-4x premium for fresh dog food over traditional kibble
Weekly delivery frequency matches Indian pet owner preferences over daily/bi-weekly
Cold chain logistics in Mumbai/Delhi/Bangalore will cost ₹40-60 per delivery in summer
FSSAI approval for human-grade pet food takes 3-6 months and costs under ₹2 lakh
Customer acquisition cost through Instagram/Facebook will be ₹800-1200 per paying customer
Monthly churn rate will be under 15% after first 3 months due to pet health improvements

testCases.notes: v5 sonucu çok daha gerçekçi. Traction 6/20 (sıfır kullanıcı). Failure mode'lar spesifik.

testCases.idea: Open-source CLI-first API testing tool (Postman alternative), git-native
testCases.founderProfile: 3 ex-Stripe engineers, $500K pre-seed Sequoia Scout, 2K GitHub stars, 400 DAU

whyThisMayFail: Postman responds aggressively with git integration and AI features, leveraging 30M user base and enterprise relationships
Enterprise sales cycles prove longer than 6 months, burning through runway before reaching Series A metrics
CLI-first approach appeals only to narrow developer segment, limiting total addressable market
Free core product cannibalization - users don't convert to paid collaboration features at sufficient rates
AI test generation proves gimmicky rather than genuinely useful, failing to differentiate from established players
Team lacks sales expertise to execute enterprise motion, missing revenue targets despite strong product
Open-source positioning makes it difficult to build defensible moat against well-funded competitors

strengths: Ex-Stripe engineering gives credibility with enterprise buyers and technical depth for API tooling
Team of 3 engineers provides sufficient technical bandwidth for core product development
Strong initial traction (2K stars, 400 DAU) demonstrates product intuition and execution ability
gaps: No dedicated sales or marketing expertise for enterprise monetization strategy
Limited experience in developer tools business models and pricing strategies
No product manager to balance technical vision with user needs and business metrics
founderFit.recommendation: Hire a technical product manager with developer tools experience by month 3. Consider fractional sales advisor with API/DevOps tool experience for enterprise motion.

assumptionLedger.assumption: Teams will pay $15/user/month for collaboration features when core tool is free
Git-native workflow is compelling enough to overcome Postman switching costs
AI test generation provides 10x productivity gain over manual test writing
Developer tools market will sustain another $100M+ API testing company
CLI-first approach appeals to 20%+ of API testing market
Ex-Stripe credibility translates to enterprise sales success

testCases.notes: Traction 12/20 (400 DAU + 2K stars) vs fikir 4'ün 6/20'si. Doğru ayrışma.

scoringCalibration.v4: 5/5 fikir aynı skor (72) ve aynı verdict (promising) — sıfır differansiyasyon
scoringCalibration.v5: Farklı skorlar (66 vs 71), sub-score breakdown ile neden farklı olduğu görülebilir
scoringCalibration.improvement: Traction sub-score en büyük ayrıştırıcı: 0 kullanıcı=6, 400 DAU=12

verdictVariety.v4: 5/5 promising — hiç risky veya weak yok
verdictVariety.v5: Hala 2/2 promising ama farklı sebeplerle ve skor aralığı 66-71 (eskiden 72-72)
verdictVariety.remainingIssue: Indian D2C (₹15L ile fresh food) ideally 'risky' olmalıydı ama 66 ile sınıra yakın

specificityOfFailureModes.v5: Spesifik: '₹15L burns through in 8-10 months', '45°C cold chain makes unit economics impossible', 'FSSAI approval takes 12+ months'
specificityOfFailureModes.improvement: Dramatically better — founder gerçekten neye dikkat etmesi gerektiğini anlayabilir

confidenceTags.v4: Yok — tüm rakamlar aynı güvenilirlikte sunuluyor
confidenceTags.v5: Her assumption tagged: 4/6 speculative (Indian D2C), 2/6 speculative (Dev tools)
confidenceTags.improvement: Founder hangi varsayımların doğrulanmamış olduğunu görebilir

founderFit.v4: Yok — ekip hakkında yorum sadece executive summary'de genel
founderFit.v5: Ayrı bölüm: strengths, gaps, specific recommendation (hire X, partner with Y)
founderFit.improvement: Actionable — 'Hire freelance marketing specialist ₹50K/month' vs 'strong team'

templateProblem.v4: Build vs Buy her briefte aynı pattern (core=build, auth=buy, payments=buy). Action plan hep 'Contact X, target Y%'
templateProblem.v5: Build vs Buy kaldırıldı. Action plan yerine 7-day validation sprint (day-by-day, spesifik platform/method)
templateProblem.improvement: Artık her brief'in action bölümü o fikre özgü

dimensions.name: Decision Clarity
dimensions.notes: Score breakdown + verdict karar vermeyi kolaylaştırıyor

dimensions.name: Realism
dimensions.notes: whyThisMayFail spesifik, confidence tags hallucination algısını azaltıyor

dimensions.name: Specificity
dimensions.notes: Confidence tags + assumption ledger + spesifik failure modes

knownIssues.description: Indian D2C (₹15L ile fresh food startup) 66 skor aldı — 'promising' sınırında. Capital insufficient olduğu için 'risky' olması gerekirdi.
knownIssues.possibleFix: Prompt'ta capital sufficiency check'i daha agresif yapılabilir: 'If stated budget covers less than 6 months of estimated burn, deduct 5 points from traction score'

knownIssues.description: Her iki test de team=16 aldı. Farklı ekip profilleri benzer skorlanıyor.
knownIssues.possibleFix: Team rubric'e daha granüler kriterler: solo vs multi-founder, technical+business mix, prior startup experience

knownIssues.description: 2/2 v5 testi 'promising' geldi. 5 farklı fikrin hepsinin test edilmesi gerekiyor ama rate limit var.
knownIssues.possibleFix: Daha aşırı test case'ler dene: sadece fikir (sıfır ekip, sıfır bütçe) vs çok güçlü startup. Verdict dağılımını doğrula.

recommendations.action: 5 v4 test case'ini v5 ile tekrar çalıştır, tam karşılaştırma tablosu oluştur
Edge case testleri: çok zayıf fikir (weak beklenir), çok güçlü fikir (strong beklenir)
Token kullanımı ve maliyet karşılaştırması: v5 prompt daha uzun, brief yapısı farklı — cost impact ölç
Concise mode v5 testi — scoreBreakdown düzgün çalışıyor mu
